subcodes.first_line: O Most Noble One! The smoke of heedlessness and the dust of vain imaginings have prevented the world from beholding the effulgent rays of the Countenance of the Lord of all mankind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اشرف عالمرا دخان غفلت و غبار اوهام از مشاهده اشراقات انوار وجه مالک انام
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
